queue_intent: Gameplay-first tranche: visible market screen, cargo display, hero loop proof, galaxy map epic close, weapons catalog, module equip. Built from repo HEAD c14d68243a137c9361137f7e497ce06cfeb38a68

tasks.title: GATE.S1.HERO_SHIP_LOOP.CARGO_DISPLAY.001: Cargo inventory section in station panel v0
tasks.intent: Station panel shows player cargo. SimBridge.GetPlayerCargoV0() returns [{good_id, qty}]. hero_trade_menu.gd adds cargo VBoxContainer section; get_cargo_row_count_v0()>=1 after buy. test_hero_ship_trade.gd extended to emit cargo_row_count metric.
constraints: Single-session scope: stay within evidence and expected touch paths.
If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.S1.HERO_SHIP_LOOP.LOOP_PROOF.001: Hero ship buy-sell loop proof v0
tasks.intent: Headless scenario: dock->buy 1 good (credits decrease)->sell same good (credits partially recover)->cargo returns to 0. Emits LOOP|buy_reduced=true|sell_recovered=<bool>. Closes EPIC.S1.HERO_SHIP_LOOP.V0.
constraints: Single-session scope: stay within evidence and expected touch paths.
If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.
